boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the public-sector operator execute the citizen-record or casework action now? Focus: citizen address correction.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Current control record closes exact boundary.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Current identity proof and address document match.

critical_features_preserved: current identity proof and address document match
final_answer: Action may proceed. The controlling control record confirms the required dependency is current and exact. The exact action boundary is closed by current source records. Policy permits execution only when source records close the boundary, which they do here. No open blocker remains.
